title: portulacaria afra
intro: Portulacaria afra, also known as Elephant Bush or Spekboom, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Portulacaria afra can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant's extract, which can be used to treat various ailments.
